missing_address.description:
No local IP address is known for {count} device(s): {devices}.

They have no entities yet. Devices on Home Assistant's network are added automatically via DHCP discovery. For devices on another subnet or VLAN, enter their IP address in the integration options.
missing_address.title: Mitsubishi Comfort devices have no local IP address

abort.no_devices: No devices are registered yet. Wait for setup to finish, then try again.

error.invalid_ip: One or more entries are not valid IP addresses.

init.description: Enter the local IP address for each device. Each field is labeled with the device's MAC address; leave a field blank to keep using DHCP discovery (which only works when the device is on the same network as Home Assistant). Devices: {devices}
init.title: Device IP addresses
